mapper.select: SELECT ROOM_ID themeId, ROOM_IMG imagePath, CAFE_ID cafeId, ROOM_NAME themeName, GENRE_ID genre, DURATION duration, DIFFICULTY difficulty, HORROR_GRADE horror, ACTIVITY_GRADE activity, PRICE price, IS_ADULT adult, MIN_PLAYERS minPlayers, MAX_PLAYERS maxPlayers, ROOM_DESC description FROM ROOM WHERE ROOM_ID = #{themeId}

SELECT R.ROOM_ID themeId, R.ROOM_NAME themeName, R.ROOM_IMG imagePath, C.CAFE_ID cafeId, C.CAFE_NAME cafeName, G.GENRE_NAME genre, R.PRICE price, R.MAX_PLAYERS maxPlayers FROM ROOM R JOIN CAFE C ON R.CAFE_ID = C.CAFE_ID JOIN ROOM_GENRE G ON R.GENRE_ID = G.GENRE_ID WHERE C.USER_ID = #{ownerUserId} ORDER BY R.ROOM_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM ROOM R JOIN CAFE C ON R.CAFE_ID = C.CAFE_ID WHERE C.USER_ID = #{ownerUserId}

SELECT A.ROOM_ID themeId, A.ROOM_IMG imagePath, B.CAFE_NAME cafeName , B.ADDRESS || ' ' || B.ADDRESS_DETAIL cafeLocation, B.PHONE cafePhone , A.ROOM_NAME themeName, C.GENRE_NAME genre, A.DURATION duration , A.DIFFICULTY difficulty, A.HORROR_GRADE horror, A.ACTIVITY_GRADE activity , A.PRICE price, A.IS_ADULT adult, A.MIN_PLAYERS minPlayers , A.MAX_PLAYERS maxPlayers, A.ROOM_DESC description FROM ROOM A JOIN CAFE B ON A.CAFE_ID = B.CAFE_ID JOIN ROOM_GENRE C ON A.GENRE_ID = C.GENRE_ID WHERE A.ROOM_ID = #{themeId}

SELECT RES_OPEN_ID AS slotId,TO_CHAR(OPEN_AT,'YYYY-MM-DD') as resDate, TO_CHAR(OPEN_AT, 'HH24:MI') as resTime , FN_RESERVATION_CHECK(RES_OPEN_ID) AS status FROM RES_OPEN WHERE ROOM_ID = #{themeId} AND OPEN_AT > SYSDATE + 1 ORDER BY OPEN_AT ASC

SELECT C.NICKNAME nickName, A.SATISFACTION satisfaction, A.DIFFICULTY difficulty , A.HORROR horror, A.ACTIVITY activity, A.IMMERSION immersion, A.REVIEW_COMMENT reviewComment FROM REVIEW A JOIN ATTENDANCE_DETAIL B ON A.DETAIL_ID = B.DETAIL_ID JOIN USER_ACCOUNT C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID JOIN ATTENDANCE D ON B.ATTENDANCE_ID = D.ATTENDANCE_ID JOIN RESERVATION E ON D.RESERVATION_ID = E.RESERVATION_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM F ON E.PARTY_ID = F.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN G ON F.RES_OPEN_ID = G.RES_OPEN_ID WHERE G.ROOM_ID = #{themeId} ORDER BY A.REVIEW_ID DESC

SELECT TRUNC(NVL(AVG(A.DIFFICULTY),0),0) AS DIFFICULTY ,TRUNC(NVL(AVG(A.HORROR),0),0) AS HORROR ,TRUNC(NVL(AVG(A.ACTIVITY),0),0) AS ACTIVITY ,TRUNC(NVL(AVG(A.IMMERSION),0),0) AS IMMERSION ,TRUNC(NVL(AVG(A.SATISFACTION),0),0) AS SATISFACTION FROM REVIEW A JOIN ATTENDANCE_DETAIL B ON A.DETAIL_ID = B.DETAIL_ID JOIN ATTENDANCE C ON B.ATTENDANCE_ID = C.ATTENDANCE_ID JOIN RESERVATION D ON C.RESERVATION_ID = D.RESERVATION_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM E ON D.PARTY_ID = E.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN F ON E.RES_OPEN_ID = F.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM G ON G.ROOM_ID = F.ROOM_ID WHERE G.ROOM_ID = #{themeId}
